content:
各位守密人：
我们注意到部分玩家访问了*** morimens.com***，并通过网页中提供的邮箱留言提交问题。特此说明，该网站由玩家自行制作并运营，旨在帮助《忘却前夜》进行宣传活动，并非官方网站。

官方网址为：
Qookka服务器：https://morimens.qookkagames.com/
Sialia服务器：https://morimens.sialiagames.com.tw/


官方客服邮箱为： 
Qookka服务器：morimens@qookkagames.com
Sialia服务器：morimens@sialiagamesinc.com.tw

我们非常感谢社区里每一位热爱游戏的伙伴，以及大家自发制作的各类网站与资源。
但为确保大家获取到准确的客服支持，以及避免个人信息暴露，请认准上方官方渠道，或直接通过客户端内的客服入口进行联络。感谢大家的支持！

Dear Keepers,

We've noticed that some players have been visiting*** morimens.com ***and submitting inquiries via the email provided on that webpage.

Please be advised that this website is created and operated by a player, intended to help promote Morimens, and is not an official website.

Our official websites are:
Qookka Server: https://morimens.qookkagames.com/ 
Sialia Server: https://morimens.sialiagames.com.tw/

Our official customer support emails are: 
Qookka Server: morimens@qookkagames.com 
Sialia Server: morimens@sialiagamesinc.com.tw

We sincerely appreciate every member of our community who shares a love for the game, as well as everyone who creates fan-made websites and resources.

That said, to ensure you receive accurate customer support and to protect your personal information from exposure, please use the official channels listed above, or contact us directly through the in-game customer support entry. Thank you for your support!

embeds.title: 禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！...
embeds.description: 這個世界正在死去。 而你或許是唯一的轉機。 連結與災厄同源的人形武器，來抵抗這場隱密而浩大的危機。 挑戰Roguelite關卡，收集克系美學角色，禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！ 歡迎入學，守密人。
